# Plugin View Visual Review Baseline

Status: in progress. This tracked baseline complements the generated Playwright artifacts from `packages/app/test/ui-smoke/plugin-views-visual.spec.ts` (`review.md`, `review.json`, screenshots, and audit JSON under `test-results/plugin-views`). Each row below must stay aligned with the visual matrix so every registered GUI/TUI view has a durable review note before deeper manual screenshot review.

Review rubric:
- Likes: what is already working visually or structurally.
- Concerns: what still needs human screenshot review, reduction, or interaction proof.
- Next proof: the next evidence needed for the view to move toward the full objective.

| View | Type | Path | Likes | Concerns | Next proof |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `birdclaw` | `gui` | `/birdclaw` | Archived-timeline tabs (home/likes/bookmarks/inbox), sync trigger, and a clear zero-key setup state when birdclaw.sh is absent. | Needs visual pass for tweet-row density, the needs-reply inbox nudge, and sync-failure banner placement. | Verify tab switching, sync button states, setup/error/retry states, and inbox triage rows against a seeded archive. |
| `birdclaw` | `tui` | `/birdclaw` | Collapsed spatial view exposes the same archive browsing surface in terminal form. | Needs command-output review for compact tweet/inbox listings. | Confirm every terminal command returns command-specific output and no pending states. |
| `cloud` | `gui` | `/cloud` | Cloud account status, credits, agents, billing, and API-key management share one account-management surface. | Needs signed-out/error/ready screenshot review against the current account DTOs. | Verify loading, signed-out, error, and ready states plus credit and API-key counts. |
| `contacts` | `gui` | `/contacts` | Familiar contact-list workflow and clear account/contact actions. | Needs visual pass for list density and empty/error states. | Verify create/import/search controls, contact rows, and avatar/initial indicators. |
| `contacts` | `tui` | `/contacts` | Terminal view has list/create/import command surface. | Needs proof that command output remains compact and structured. | Click every terminal command and verify semantic output. |
| `hyperliquid` | `gui` | `/hyperliquid` | Market/trading domain has strong metric-card potential. | Needs screenshot review for chart/table density and risk/status indicators. | Verify market, execution, and account panels render without broken assets. |
| `hyperliquid` | `tui` | `/hyperliquid` | TUI exposes state, market, and execution-check commands. | Needs contract proof for trading safety output and error states. | Verify each command settles with `[ok]` or `[error]` and useful data. |
| `focus` | `gui` | `/focus` | Focus controls now have a dedicated launcher entry instead of being buried in the old LifeOps shell. | Needs screenshot review for schedule/session density and platform-permission states. | Verify active block state, app/site controls, and empty states render without broken cards. |
| `focus` | `tui` | `/focus` | Terminal contract exposes focus schedule and active-session commands. | Needs command-output review for terse block/session status. | Confirm every terminal command returns command-specific output and no pending states. |
| `calendar` | `gui` | `/calendar` | Calendar has a focused owner-facing route for day/week/month inspection. | Needs screenshot review for event density, conflict badges, and connector-empty states. | Verify week grid, event details, and conflict indicators render from mocked data. |
| `calendar` | `tui` | `/calendar` | Terminal contract exposes calendar state and event-listing commands. | Needs command-output review for compact event/conflict status. | Confirm every terminal command returns command-specific output and no pending states. |
| `documents` | `gui` | `/documents` | Document triage is isolated into a searchable owner workflow. | Needs signature queue and fragment-list visual proof. | Verify recent/search/signature tabs and empty/error states. |
| `documents` | `tui` | `/documents` | Terminal contract exposes document state, search, and signature-queue commands. | Needs command-output review for compact recent/search results. | Confirm every terminal command returns command-specific output and no pending states. |
| `finances` | `gui` | `/finances` | Finance dashboard can now be reviewed as a standalone money-admin surface. | Needs balance, recurring-charge, and transaction-table density review. | Verify dashboard metrics and transaction rows render without placeholder gaps. |
| `finances` | `tui` | `/finances` | Terminal contract exposes balance, recurring-charge, and transaction commands. | Needs command-output review for compact money-admin status. | Confirm every terminal command returns command-specific output and no pending states. |
| `goals` | `gui` | `/goals` | Goals, routines, reminders, and self-care now have a dedicated life-direction view. | Needs review for board density and completion/snooze affordances. | Verify goals, routines, reminders, alarms, and check-in panels. |
| `goals` | `tui` | `/goals` | Terminal contract exposes goals, routines, reminders, and check-in commands. | Needs command-output review for compact completion/snooze status. | Confirm every terminal command returns command-specific output and no pending states. |
| `lifeops-live-test` | `gui` | `/lifeops-live-test` | Developer live-test surface shows model/connector readiness, run probes, and recent scheduled-task fire controls from one spatial source. | Needs screenshot proof for ready/not-ready and fire-result states before it can be treated as polished user UX. | Verify model/connector readiness rows, reminder/check-in probe buttons, retry, and fire-now task rows. |
| `lifeops-live-test` | `tui` | `/lifeops-live-test` | Terminal rendering uses the same spatial source as GUI/XR for live validation. | Needs command-output review for checklist and fire-result density. | Confirm every terminal command returns command-specific output and no pending states. |
| `health` | `gui` | `/health` | Health/sleep/screen-time signals are split into a domain-specific view. | Needs connector status and sleep/circadian chart proof. | Verify sleep, activity, screen-time, and connector-state sections. |
| `health` | `tui` | `/health` | Terminal contract exposes sleep, activity, screen-time, and connector-state commands. | Needs command-output review for compact health-signal status. | Confirm every terminal command returns command-specific output and no pending states. |
| `inbox` | `gui` | `/inbox` | Cross-channel triage has a standalone unresolved-item workflow. | Needs message-row density and action-state review. | Verify triage list, snooze/archive/follow-up controls, and empty states. |
| `inbox` | `tui` | `/inbox` | Terminal contract exposes triage-list, snooze, archive, and follow-up commands. | Needs command-output review for compact unresolved-item status. | Confirm every terminal command returns command-specific output and no pending states. |
| `relationships` | `gui` | `/relationships` | Entity/relationship knowledge graph now has a dedicated viewer with per-entity cards, identity claims, and outbound edges. | Needs entity-card density review and a larger-graph layout pass (no graph-viz dependency yet). | Verify entity cards, identity lines, edge meta (type/cadence/last-contact), kind filters, and empty/error states from mocked entity + relationship payloads. |
| `relationships` | `tui` | `/relationships` | Terminal contract exposes entity, identity-claim, and outbound-edge commands. | Needs command-output review for compact entity/edge listings. | Confirm every terminal command returns command-specific output and no pending states. |
| `todos` | `gui` | `/todos` | Todo management has a clear three-lane board entry. | Needs drag/completion and lane-empty-state proof. | Verify Today, Upcoming, Someday lanes and item actions. |
| `todos` | `tui` | `/todos` | Terminal contract exposes todo-listing, completion, and lane commands. | Needs command-output review for compact Today/Upcoming/Someday status. | Confirm every terminal command returns command-specific output and no pending states. |
| `messages` | `gui` | `/messages` | Conversation/thread workflow is direct and recognizable. | Needs avatar/thread/media empty-state review. | Verify threads, compose, send-role gating, and account badges. |
| `messages` | `tui` | `/messages` | TUI covers list/send/request-role actions. | Needs send-flow mock output and permission-state proof. | Verify list and send commands render semantic output. |
| `model-tester` | `gui` | `/model-tester` | Probe dashboard has clear test categories. | Needs icon/graph emphasis over explanatory text. | Verify text/audio/vision/VAD controls and result states. |
| `model-tester` | `tui` | `/model-tester` | TUI exposes status and probe commands. | Needs proof that failures remain visible but compact. | Run all probe commands in visual smoke and inspect outputs. |
| `phone` | `gui` | `/phone` | Dialer/recents/contact pattern is understandable. | Needs phone-specific icon affordance review and call-status states. | Verify dialer, recents, contacts, transcript save, and permission gates. |
| `phone` | `tui` | `/phone` | TUI covers state/place-call/open-dialer/save-transcript. | Needs command mock coverage for call lifecycle edge cases. | Verify each phone command emits structured output. |
| `polymarket` | `gui` | `/polymarket` | Market cards and orderbook concepts support strong visual scanning. | Needs risk/trading-readiness indicators reviewed for clarity. | Verify markets, orderbook, positions, and trading check states. |
| `polymarket` | `tui` | `/polymarket` | TUI covers state/market/orderbook/positions/trading-check. | Needs proof that trading caveats are concise. | Verify all terminal commands and semantic output snippets. |
| `wallet` | `gui` | `/wallet` | Inventory/market/trading profile can be highly visual. | Needs asset/token imagery and balance/table review. | Verify balances, market overview, token rows, and trading profile indicators. |
| `wallet` | `tui` | `/wallet` | TUI exposes wallet state, market, and profile commands. | Needs output review for asset names and warnings. | Verify all wallet commands emit structured state. |
| `vector-browser` | `gui` | `/vector-browser` | Memory/vector exploration has clear list, projection, and graph affordances. | Needs WebGL/canvas screenshot proof and fallback review on constrained devices. | Verify list mode, 2D projection, 3D graph, and manager launch path render without blank states. |
| `vector-browser` | `tui` | `/vector-browser` | Terminal contract exposes memory-listing and projection commands. | Needs command-output review for compact list/projection status on constrained devices. | Confirm every terminal command returns command-specific output and no pending states. |
| `feed` | `gui` | `/feed` | Feed/operator layout gives live status and communication affordances. | Needs visual hierarchy review for dashboard/message areas. | Verify refresh, live dashboard, and team-message controls. |
| `feed` | `tui` | `/feed` | TUI covers get-state, refresh, dashboard, and message commands. | Needs concise message-send output proof. | Verify every command produces command-specific output. |
| `views-manager` | `gui` | `/views` | Central view catalog now uses icons and compact launch controls. | Needs screenshot pass for GUI/TUI/XR grouping and no prose sprawl. | Verify registered view tiles, launch controls, and empty states. |
| `views-manager` | `tui` | `/views` | TUI can list/open registered terminal views. | Needs route contract proof after XR additions. | Verify list and open commands against real registered views. |
| `screenshare` | `gui` | `/screenshare` | Remote session/viewer workflow has clear visual affordances. | Needs viewer URL/session/start/stop review. | Verify session status, viewer controls, input controls, and permission states. |
| `screenshare` | `tui` | `/screenshare` | TUI covers state/start/session/stop/input/viewer-url. | Needs command coverage across session lifecycle. | Verify every command produces command-specific output. |
| `task-coordinator` | `gui` | `/task-coordinator` | Task/session panels are operationally useful. | Needs dense dashboard review and flow coverage for task actions. | Verify session list, thread list, create/update/fork/agent controls. |
| `task-coordinator` | `tui` | `/task-coordinator` | TUI exposes broad task/session command set. | Needs command output review for all orchestrator operations. | Verify all terminal command buttons settle with semantic output. |
| `orchestrator` | `gui` | `/orchestrator` | Orchestration view mirrors task state and agent controls. | Needs visual distinction from task-coordinator and flow proof. | Verify task list, agent controls, and action states. |
| `orchestrator` | `tui` | `/orchestrator` | TUI covers orchestrator task and agent commands. | Needs broad command-output proof. | Verify all commands return structured results. |
| `cockpit` | `gui` | `/cockpit` | Developer-only coding cockpit exposes task-room sessions, terminal launch, and drill-in agent controls. | Needs screenshot review for mobile density, terminal overlay states, and live PTY availability. | Verify spawn buttons, session selection, terminal overlay, and fallback error states. |
| `trajectory-logger` | `gui` | `/trajectory-logger` | Timeline/log view supports evidence-rich inspection. | Needs typography/density review for event rows and filters. | Verify trajectory list, filters, latest-open, and empty states. |
| `trajectory-logger` | `tui` | `/trajectory-logger` | TUI covers list/open/filter/refresh. | Needs output proof for filter changes. | Verify commands update or report trajectory state. |
| `training` | `gui` | `/apps/fine-tuning` | Fine-tuning workflow has rich pipeline/status opportunities. | Needs dense multi-section review and prose pruning. | Verify dataset, job, benchmark, eval, model activation, and readiness states. |
| `training` | `tui` | `/apps/fine-tuning` | TUI exposes extensive training/eval/benchmark commands. | Needs broad command-output proof and timeout review. | Verify all terminal commands settle with clear result categories. |
| `facewear` | `tui` | `/apps/facewear` | TUI covers device connect, diagnostics, emulator, and setup commands. | Needs command-output proof across device unavailable states. | Verify every command returns meaningful mocked status. |
| `smartglasses` | `tui` | `/apps/smartglasses` | TUI covers smartglasses setup/status/diagnostics. | Needs command-output proof for native bridge unavailable states. | Verify all commands settle and expose device state. |
